mapper.update: UPDATE t_approval_workflow SET approver_id = #{approverId}, status = #{status}, approve_comment = #{approveComment}, approved_at = #{approvedAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE approval_id = #{approvalId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_approval_workflow WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId}
SELECT * FROM t_approval_workflow WHERE status = 'PENDING' AND timeout_at < #{now}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM t_approval_workflow WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND status = #{status}
